health_conditions: chronic right anterior delt pain from overuse tear

benefits.description: Chronic right anterior delt pain from overuse tear significantly reduced. Pain changed from constant 24/7 to intermittent, only during overwork. Several days with zero pain. Improvement in sleeping on the injured shoulder.
Anti-inflammatory effect noted, particularly within first couple days of cycle

protocol_notes: 500mcg daily split into 250mcg AM and 250mcg PM, approximately 6-8 hours apart. Intramuscular injection into right side deltoid. User emphasized concurrent physical therapy, stretching, time off lifting, and 2 weeks off work as contributing factors. Also used CBD and magnesium oil. About 2 weeks off cycle at time of report.
